items.name: Anvil I
items.description: Single-action hand cannon with high damage and headshot damage, but slow handling.

items.name: Anvil II
items.description: Single-action hand cannon with high damage and headshot damage, but slow handling.

items.name: Anvil III
items.description: Single-action hand cannon with high damage and headshot damage, but slow handling.

items.name: Anvil IV
items.description: Single-action hand cannon with high damage and headshot damage, but slow handling.

items.name: Aphelion
items.description: An experimental ARC beam weapon powered by a Matriarch Reactor.

items.name: Arpeggio I
items.description: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Arpeggio II
items.description: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Arpeggio III
items.description: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Arpeggio IV
items.description: Has decent damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Bettina I
items.description: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.

items.name: Bettina II
items.description: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.

items.name: Bettina III
items.description: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.

items.name: Bettina IV
items.description: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.

items.name: Bobcat I
items.description: Fully automatic SMG with high fire rate but low accuracy.

items.name: Bobcat II
items.description: Fully automatic SMG with high fire rate but low accuracy.

items.name: Bobcat III
items.description: Fully automatic SMG with high fire rate but low accuracy.

items.name: Bobcat IV
items.description: Fully automatic SMG with high fire rate but low accuracy.

items.name: Buried City JKV Employee Access Card
Burletta I
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol with decent damage output and accuracy. Can be fired as fast as you can pull the trigger.

items.name: Burletta II
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol with decent damage output and accuracy. Can be fired as fast as you can pull the trigger.

items.name: Burletta III
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol with decent damage output and accuracy. Can be fired as fast as you can pull the trigger.

items.name: Burletta IV
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol with decent damage output and accuracy. Can be fired as fast as you can pull the trigger.

items.name: Dolabra
items.description: An experimental weapon that can either fire a wide short range blast, or be focused to fire a tight medium range beam of heat.

items.name: Equalizer
items.description: A high capacity experimental beam rifle.

items.name: Ferro I
items.description: Packs a punch, but must be reloaded between every shot.

items.name: Ferro II
items.description: Packs a punch, but must be reloaded between every shot.

items.name: Ferro III
items.description: Packs a punch, but must be reloaded between every shot.

items.name: Ferro IV
items.description: Packs a punch, but must be reloaded between every shot.

items.name: Hairpin I
items.description: Has a built-in silencer. Great for stealth, but tricky in combat.

items.name: Hairpin II
items.description: Has a built-in silencer. Great for stealth, but tricky in combat.

items.name: Hairpin III
items.description: Has a built-in silencer. Great for stealth, but tricky in combat.

items.name: Hairpin IV
items.description: Has a built-in silencer. Great for stealth, but tricky in combat.

items.name: Hullcracker I
items.description: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.

items.name: Hullcracker II
items.description: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.

items.name: Hullcracker III
items.description: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.

items.name: Hullcracker IV
items.description: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.

items.name: Il Toro I
items.description: Pump-action shotgun with large bullet spread, sharp falloff, and high damage output.

items.name: Il Toro II
items.description: Pump-action shotgun with large bullet spread, sharp falloff, and high damage output.

items.name: Il Toro III
items.description: Pump-action shotgun with large bullet spread, sharp falloff, and high damage output.

items.name: Il Toro IV
items.description: Pump-action shotgun with large bullet spread, sharp falloff, and high damage output.

items.name: Jupiter
items.description: A bolt-action sniper rifle with exceptional damage output and accuracy, but slow handling.

items.name: Kettle I
items.description: Quick and accurate, but has low bullet velocity and takes a long time to reload.

items.name: Kettle II
items.description: Semi-automatic assault rifle. Quick and accurate, but has low bullet velocity and takes a long time reload.

items.name: Kettle III
items.description: Quick and accurate, but has low bullet velocity and takes a long time to reload.

items.name: Kettle IV
items.description: Quick and accurate, but has low bullet velocity and takes a long time to reload.

items.name: Osprey I
items.description: A scoped bolt-action sniper rifle with reliable damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Osprey II
items.description: A scoped bolt-action sniper rifle with reliable damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Osprey III
items.description: A scoped bolt-action sniper rifle with reliable damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Osprey IV
items.description: A scoped bolt-action sniper rifle with reliable damage output and accuracy.

items.name: Rattler I
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle. A cheap offensive option, but has to be reloaded 2 bullets at a time.

items.name: Rattler II
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle. A cheap offensive option, but has to be reloaded 2 bullets at a time.

items.name: Rattler III
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle. A cheap offensive option, but has to be reloaded 2 bullets at a time.

items.name: Rattler IV
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle. A cheap offensive option, but has to be reloaded 2 bullets at a time.

items.name: Renegade I
items.description: Lever-action battle rifle with high damage output, accuracy, and headshot damage.

items.name: Renegade II
items.description: Lever-action battle rifle with high damage output, accuracy, and headshot damage.

items.name: Renegade III
items.description: Lever-action battle rifle with high damage output, accuracy, and headshot damage.

items.name: Renegade IV
items.description: Lever-action battle rifle with high damage output, accuracy, and headshot damage.

items.name: Stitcher I
items.description: Deals good damage, but has quite a low fire-rate and can be hard to control.

items.name: Stitcher II
items.description: Deals good damage, but has quite a low fire-rate and can be hard to control.

items.name: Stitcher III
items.description: Full automatic SMG. Deals good damage, but has quite a low fire-rate and can be hard to control.

items.name: Stitcher IV
items.description: Full automatic SMG. Deals good damage, but has quite a low fire-rate and can be hard to control.

items.name: Tempest I
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle with moderate fire rate and accuracy.

items.name: Tempest II
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle with moderate fire rate and accuracy.

items.name: Tempest III
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle with moderate fire rate and accuracy.

items.name: Tempest IV
items.description: Fully automatic assault rifle with moderate fire rate and accuracy.

items.name: Torrente I
items.description: Has a large ammo capacity, but is only accurate while crouched

items.name: Torrente II
items.description: Has a large ammo capacity, but is only accurate while crouched.

items.name: Torrente III
items.description: Has a large ammo capacity, but is only accurate while crouched.

items.name: Torrente IV
items.description: Has a large ammo capacity, but is only accurate while crouched.

items.name: Venator I
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Fires two shots at a time.

items.name: Venator II
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Fires two shots at a time.

items.name: Venator III
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Fires two shots at a time.

items.name: Venator IV
items.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Fires two shots at a time.

items.name: Vulcano I
items.description: Semi-automatic shotgun with good bullet spread but sharp falloff

items.name: Vulcano II
items.description: Semi-automatic shotgun with good bullet spread but sharp falloff

items.name: Vulcano III
items.description: Semi-automatic shotgun with good bullet spread but sharp falloff

items.name: Vulcano IV
items.description: Semi-automatic shotgun with good bullet spread but sharp falloff

quests.name: A Bad Feeling
quests.description:
Even the slightest change to ARC's behavior could spell disaster.

And that signal you heard? It's like nothing we've ever picked up. If they're up to something, we need to find out whatever we can.
objectives: Find and search any ARC Probe or ARC Courier

quests.name: A Balanced Harvest
quests.description: Our food production is finally enough to meet our basic needs, but what we really need now is variety. I have a lead on some agricultural research from before the First Wave. Are you in?
objectives: Go to the Research & Administration building
Locate Lab 1 on the upper floor above the reception
Search for any traces of the agricultural research project

quests.name: A Better Use
quests.description: We're short on everything but mouths to feed, yet Celeste's launching precious supplies into the air for Raiders to claw over. I’m done letting the good stuff go to waste.
objectives: Request in a Supply Drop from a Call Station
Loot a Supply Drop

quests.name: A Dead End
quests.description:
I… I don’t get it. One day they were trying to stave off the Collapse, and then, suddenly… Nothing.

That earthquake-resistant housing project was shut down by a group named MANTIKOR. Think you could find out more?
objectives: Find MANTIKOR's underground facilities
Find a way into into the locked room in the Security Wing
Search the locked room for any records on Project Heartwood
Find the Dusty Film Reel
Deliver the Dusty Film Reel to Shani

quests.name: A First Foothold
quests.description:
We’ve only just finished expanding the Tube network towards the Blue Gate, and we’re still laboring away at the rest.

My crew’s been building new infrastructure around the valley to safeguard our Raiders, but the constant ARC threat has made it difficult to get anything done.
objectives: Stabilize the observation deck near the Ridgeline
Enable the comms terminal near the Olive Grove
Rotate the satellite dishes on the church roof, north of the Data Vault
Nail down the roof plates on the Raider structure near Trapper's Glade

quests.name: A Lay of the Land
quests.description:
Those distant rumbles are getting less distant with each passing day.

I have a lead on some LiDAR scanners that may help us monitor the tremors. You do want to keep a roof over your head, don’t you?
objectives: Reach the Jiangsu Warehouse
Find the shipping notes in the foreman’s office
Locate the scanners in the Flight Control office of Control Tower A6
Deliver 1 LiDAR Scanners to Shani

quests.name: A New Type of Plant
quests.description: Some scouts have been bringing back reports of these weird plants spreading into the area. Now, this makes your old pal Lance think it may have some interesting uses.
objectives: Search for the new plant near the Baron Husk in the Old Battleground
Deliver the Possibly Toxic Plant to Lance

quests.name: A Prime Specimen
quests.description: That Deforester by the Blue Gate may have caused some real devastation, but a pristine husk like that is also an invaluable sample for our research.
objectives: Obtain 2 ARC Powercells
Interact with any ARC Deforester
Loot an ARC Deforester

quests.name: A Reveal in Ruins
quests.description: I got my hands on a fancy new ESR analyzer; had a whole big reveal planned. One minute it’s here, next minute—poof. Please help?
objectives: Search for an ESR Analyzer inside any pharmacy in Buried City
Deliver the ESR Analyzer to Lance

quests.name: A Rising Tide
quests.description: Says here there was a foreman at The Dam, who got recruited right after they canceled Project Heartwood. Got put in charge of some big reconstruction project.
objectives: On Buried City, find the foreman's barricaded apartment south of Piazza Roma
Access the foreman's digital logbook
On Dam Battlegrounds, reach the Power Generation Complex
Find a way into the Controlled Access Zone
Search the Controlled Access Zone for any clues about the foreman's reconstruction project

quests.name: A Symbol of Unification
quests.description: Y’know, back in the day we actually used to have a flag - well, a scrap of cloth more than anything. Still, seeing it meant you knew you had allies nearby, that you were on your own home turf. So, I was thinking…
objectives: Reach the Formicai Outpost in Dam Battlegrounds
Locate the flag at the Formicai Outpost
Hoist the flag on the small platform overlooking the Red Lake

quests.name: A Toxic Trail
quests.description: We've got clean water again, but we can't risk people falling ill if the saboteurs return. We need to root them out once and for all.
objectives: Return to the water intake below the Water Treatment Control building
Search the swamp for traces of the barrel's origins
Take a photo of the barrel truck
Search the truck for clues about the saboteur's identity

quests.name: A Warm Place To Rest
quests.description: A customer of mine saw a family taking cover in an old encampment in Buried City. I'll pay anyone who manages to find them and escort them back to safety.
objectives: Locate the Abandoned Highway Camp
Search for any signs of survivors
Follow the red markers
Inspect the grave

quests.name: A Wrench in the Works
quests.description: Looks like the resentment ended up reaching the ground staff of the Spaceport itself. A mutiny brewing, right in the heart of the Exodus.
objectives: Search the buses near the western gate
Locate the stash of sabotage supplies hidden at the Water Towers

quests.name: After Rain Comes
quests.description:
I know, I know! The power's down in sector—
Oh, hey. A flash flood took out some of our solar panels in Buried City, and the generators only hold on for so long.

Do us all a solid when you're up there, OK?
objectives: Find the flooded solar panels nearby the Grandioso Apartments
Repair the solar panels using 5 Wires and 2 Batteries

quests.name: Armored Transports
quests.description:
Ever since we expanded the tunnels to the Blue Gate, some rare pieces have started appearing on the black market.

Meanwhile, I'm stuck here peddling battered old Rattlers. If I don't find new supply lines, I'll be left in the dust.
objectives: Reach the Checkpoint
Search the Guard huts for an Armored Patrol Key Card
Reach the Traffic Tunnel near the Blue Gate Checkpoint
Find and unlock the rear door of an armored patrol car

quests.name: Back on Top
quests.description: Guess what? Shani asked me to help out with something, and for once, I’m actually glad she did. We’re setting up new outposts topside! Or, planning to, at least. Can you believe it?
objectives: On Dam Battlegrounds, mark the Pattern House
On The Blue Gate, mark the white lookout tower south of the Warehouse Complex
On Spaceport, mark the South Trench Tower
On Buried City, mark the building with the mural in the Buried Properties

quests.name: Battening Down
quests.description: We’d hoped the seawalls at Riven Tides might offer us some protection from the elements, but it seems the hurricanes were not kind to this place, either.
objectives: Photograph the cracks forming in the seawall
Sample the shoreline near the hotel beach
Fix the leaking oil pipe in the northeast

quests.name: Bees!
quests.description: Bees! There are bees still around! While I’m no expert, our greenhouse crew desperately wants some.
objectives: Reach the Olive Grove in Blue Gate
Search for bee hives around the Olive Grove

quests.name: Bombing Run
quests.description: Now, time to see if that recon paid off. If we can teach Raiders to effectively counter Bombardiers up there, we’d be a lot safer down here.
objectives: Destroy a Bombardier
Deliver a Bombardier Cell to Shani

quests.name: Broken Monument
quests.description: I have another special site I need you to search for me. An old battlegrounds, from the First Wave. Raiders nowadays usually pick places like that clean, despite the significance they once held. People forget quickly. Quicker than they should.
objectives: Reach the hallowed grounds by the Scrap Yard
Search for a compass near the broken-down vehicles
Search for the video tape near the cylindrical containers
Search for the old field rations in the Raider camp
Deliver the First Wave Tape to Tian Wen
Deliver First Wave Compass to Tian Wen
Deliver First Wave Rations to Tian Wen

quests.name: Building a Library
quests.description: Our library selection has grown pretty stale. Could you head out to Buried City, and find something more for us to read? Make sure you bring something for everyone.
objectives: Locate the Library in the City Center
Find 1 romance book
Find 1 detective book
Find 1 adventure book
Deliver 3 books to Apollo

quests.name: Celeste’s Journals
quests.description: Okay, so this is awkward… I lost two of my journals during some outpost inspections last time I went topside. Could you head out there and try to find them back before someone else stumbles on them?
objectives: Retrieve Celeste’s Journals from the South Swamp Outpost
Retrieve Celeste’s Journals from Raider Outpost East
Deliver 2 Journals to Celeste

quests.name: Clamoring for Attention
quests.description: I think I've found something we might exploit. When bigger ARC machines are just far enough from each other, a well-timed distraction could pull one out of position. You want to test that idea?
objectives: Use 3 Wires to repair and sound the emergency siren by the Warehouse Complex
Use a Battery to start the boom box in the Village
Sound any bus horn by the Checkpoint

quests.name: Clearer Skies
quests.description:
A swarm of disoriented Wasps crashed near one of our skylights.

I need you to help thin ARC's ranks before any more accidents happen, and gather some extra sturdy materials to fix the damage.
objectives: Destroy 3 ARC enemies
Get 3 ARC Alloy for Shani

quests.name: Cold Storage
quests.description: Reports about Stella Montis keep coming in, and it’s unlike anything we’ve seen before. There may be records or relics from the past in there, and if so, I want them.
objectives: Search any J Kozma Ventures container
Deliver the Old World Books to Shani

quests.name: Collision Course
quests.description: Many Raiders have learned how to dodge a Comet, but far too few know how to bring them down and get at their inner parts.
objectives: Destroy a Comet
Deliver a Comet Igniter to Tian Wen

quests.name: Combat Recon
quests.description:
With those Bombardiers roaming around, ARC has found an entirely new way to flush Raiders out of cover. 

If you’re hoping to take one down, you’ll need to sharpen your skills and your strategy.
objectives: Scope out a cover spot in the Parking Garage staircases
Scope out a cover spot in the buses near Marano Park
Scope out a cover spot in the attics around Main Street
Destroy 2 Spotters
Deliver a Spotter Relay to Shani

quests.name: Communication Hideout
quests.description: We've been losing signals in some areas of Buried City—my guess is that our equipment is acting up. You’re quite skilled with repairs, aren’t you? Could you check it out?
objectives: Reach the Red Tower in Old Town
Find missing battery cell
Install the battery cell in the Generator
Enable the power on the Generator
Boot the antenna terminal near the Red Tower

quests.name: Deciphering The Data
quests.description:
If the data you found can keep the ceiling from collapsing, we have no time to spare.

I know of a few magnetic decryptors around Acerra Spaceport, from back during the Exodus. They might still be working.
objectives: Use the Magnetic Decryptor in the Fuel Control Building
Reach the Arrival Building in Spaceport
Use the Magnetic Decryptor on the top floor of the Arrival Building

quests.name: Digging Up Dirt
quests.description: We caught a break. One of our scouts saw a member of the Tubes Management make a dead drop inside the Santa Maria Houses in the Buried City. This might be our chance to dig up some dirt on them for a change. You in?
objectives: Locate the Santa Maria Houses in Old Town
Locate the Dead Drop inside the courtyard

quests.name: Doctor's Orders
quests.description: Say, newbie: if you want me to treat you, you better prove that those precious limbs of yours are worth bandaging.
objectives: Obtain 1 Syringe
Obtain 2 Antiseptic
Obtain 1 Durable Cloth
Obtain 1 Great Mullein

quests.name: Dormant Barons
quests.description:
During the First Wave, the Barons did more damage than all the other machines combined. Now they’re mere husks; fixed in place where they once fell... 

Still, their internals might hold the answer to keeping ARC at bay. So open one up, and bring me whatever is inside.
objectives: Loot a Baron husk

quests.name: Down to Earth
quests.description:
Raiders have long reported peculiar-looking crates dropping down from malfunctioning ARC Probes. 

If we can figure out a way to crack them open, we might get a better understanding of what it is they’re after.
objectives: Visit a Field Depot
Deliver a Field Crate to a Field Depot
Collect the reward

quests.name: Dust on the Wires
quests.description: I sent a scout team to the Spaceport a while ago. Routine work — cataloging security, see if there's anything we could re-purpose. But I've heard nothing for two days.
objectives: Visit any Field Depot on the eastern side of the Spaceport
Use the Field Radio to transmit the scout group’s last log to Shani
Interact with the terminal in the old Raider Tower north of the Maintenance Hangar
Find traces of the scout patrol near the Maintenance Hangar
Search the remains left by the scouts
Deliver the Scout Patrol Note to Shani

quests.name: Echoes of Victory Ridge
quests.description: Did you feel any tremors last night? Me neither. But apparently the ground shifted at some point, and in the process it unearthed an old First Wave outpost that’d been blocked by debris. I’d like you to get in there quick, before anyone else does.
objectives: Reach Victory Ridge
Retrieve the battle plans from the hideout under the broken highway
Deliver Major Aiva's Patch to Celeste

quests.name: Espresso
quests.description: A Raider came into my shop earlier, to trade some grenades for a machine she found in Buried City. She said it makes coffee, but it seems to be missing a few parts. Up for a job?
objectives: Find an espresso machine to salvage for spare parts
Get the Espresso Machine Parts for Apollo

quests.name: Eyes in the Sky
quests.description: Those LiDAR scanners you found work best when put in high locations. I’ve identified a few good spots around the Rust Belt; hope you’re surefooted.
objectives: On Dam Battlegrounds, install a LiDAR Scanner at the top of the Control Tower
On Spaceport, install a LiDAR Scanner at the Communications Tower
On Buried City, install a LiDAR Scanner on top of the Galleria sign

quests.name: Eyes on the Prize
quests.description: Everything’s been calm around my drop-offs since you helped out, but that doesn’t mean it’ll stay that way for long. I’ve set up surveillance at one of my most used spots in Buried City, to prevent future tampering. Only problem is, it needs power to go live.
objectives: Find the secluded roof terrace south-west of the Southern Station, look for blue tarps.
Rewire the solar panel using 3 Wires

quests.name: Flickering Threat
quests.description: My usual engineer is still healing from his wounds, and has been loopy for days. We can’t afford to be at half-grid until he heals; I need someone to pick up his wrench in the mean time.
objectives: Find the Generator Room
Repair the Generator using 4 Wires
Find the Ventilation Shaft
Enable the power via the power switch underneath the stairs

quests.name: Fragmented Logs
quests.description: Now that we’ve found our footing on Stella Montis, several parties are interested in digging a bit deeper and seeing what we can find out about the past of this place. To do so, however, we’ll need to power up some of these old machines so we can start to sift through the data.
objectives: In either of the Robotic Sandbox control rooms, repair the out-of-service terminal with 1 Electrical Component
Enable the power in any of the conduit backrooms near the Robotic Sandboxes
Boot the main frame data terminal in the Cultural Archives service backrooms

quests.name: Furtive Meetings
quests.description: I’m still sorting through the data you found in Stella Montis, but something’s caught my eye. I’d like you to look into it.
objectives: Search for the secret meeting spot under a staircase in the Medical Research Area
Find the secret meeting spot near the ventilation shaft between Robotic Sandbox B and Seed Vault
Find the secret meeting spot at the bottom of the staircase connecting the Cultural Archives and Seed Vault
Search the meeting area
Bring the Secret Meeting Info to Shani

quests.name: Greasing Her Palms
quests.description:
Recently, I’ve been trying and failing to get Tian Wen to join our community projects.

I may have to sweeten the deal. She’s been complaining about the quality of salvage found on the market; think we could do her a solid?
objectives: On Dam Battlegrounds, visit the Locked Room in the Water Treatment Control building
On Spaceport, scope out the rocket thrusters outside the Rocket Assembly
On Buried City, visit the barricaded area on floor 6 of the Space Travel Building

quests.name: Groundbreaking
quests.description: Data or no data: we’ll learn how to make this place earthquake-proof. With a research this in-depth, there’s bound to be a paper trail somewhere.
objectives: Enter the locked room at Pilgrim's Peak
Search the room for any construction research
Find the building pictured on the whiteboard
Photograph the abandoned housing project

quests.name: Hatch Repairs
quests.description: Our scouts have reported several Raider Hatches with leaking hydraulic pipes. They still work, but not for long. Mind patching one up, next time you’re out there?
objectives: Repair the leaking hydraulic pipes near a Raider Hatch

quests.name: In My Image
quests.description: I just treated one of the first Raiders who visited Stella Montis, and she said that she saw... others. Androids, very much like me.
objectives: Deploy into Stella Montis
Find and search 3 Androids

quests.name: Industrial Espionage
quests.description: With my own stashes secured, I think it might be time to keep a closer eye on the competition so this doesn’t happen again.
objectives: Find Tian Wen's weapon cache near the Gas Station in the Outskirts
Deliver the Burletta to the rival weapon cache
Plant a bug on the weapon cache

quests.name: Into the Fray
quests.description:
It used to be their world, up there. Nobody to challenge their claim. 

Yet here we are. More outposts. More intel. More firepower. If I didn’t know better, I’d say we’ve got quite a bit of fight left in us.
objectives: Destroy a Leaper
Obtain a Leaper Pulse Unit

quests.name: Keeping an Eye Out
quests.description:
I’m looking for someone. Bilguun. You might’ve seen him around, but chances are you haven’t. He’s… not the most sociable person around, you see.

He spends a lot of time Topside, but usually returns to Speranza regularly to check in.
objectives: Locate the collapsed highway by the southern edge of the Barren Clearing
Find Bilguun's shelter, and search for any clues of his presence

quests.name: Keeping the Memory
quests.description: I lost my cool a bit when I sent you after that trap. I don’t usually lose my temper, but the First Wave… We went through a lot, back then. Lost a lot of people. It’s still a bit of a raw wound for me, but I want you to understand.
objectives: Reach the wreckage in the Formicai Hills
Search for the missing helmet
Return the helmet to the memorial

quests.name: Last Entry
quests.description: More mentions of Mantikor, and more clear signs of dissent among the researchers. I suspect tensions eventually escalated.
objectives: Find and access the right work station in the Seed Vault for clues
Search for the hidden key in the adjacent room
Search the Seed Vault and unlock the seed deposit box
Search the seed deposit box
Bring the Official Shutdown Documentation to Shani

quests.name: Life of a Pharmacist
quests.description: This place could use a makeover, but I don’t want it looking like your raggedy Raider Dens. See if you can find out how my fellow medical greats used to live.
objectives: Find the Arbusto Farmacia by the collapsed highway
Document the pharmacist’s hobbies
Document the pharmacist’s family
Document the pharmacist’s taste
Document the pharmacist’s skills

quests.name: Line in the Sand
quests.description: That Stella Montis hard drive contained more than just the shutdown documentation - it also had the transport schedules of some pretty critical Exodus components.
objectives: Find out why the train never reached Marano Station
Find out who orchestrated the robbery
Find out where the thruster valves were stashed
Search the basement of the merchant’s nearby apartment

quests.name: Lost in Transmission
quests.description: I have equipment set up at the Spaceport, to monitor ARC’s movements. My connection broke down just now — I need you to head to the Control Towers and help me retrieve my logs.
objectives: Visit Control Tower A6
Reach the top of Control Tower A6
Establish a connection from the terminal

quests.name: Marked for Death
quests.description: Someone has been lifting supplies from my drop-off point in Buried City. I’ve set up a trap, but I need someone to check it for me.
objectives: Reach the Su Durante Warehouses in the Outskirts in Buried City
Search for Tian Wen's cache near the Warehouses
Follow the clues

quests.name: Market Correction
quests.description: That theft before? Doesn’t look like a coincidence anymore. Some of the competition from Toledo is setting up shop where they don’t belong. I want their cache sabotaged, preferably before they get too comfortable.
objectives: Locate the cache near Marano Station
Sabotage the cache

quests.name: Medical Merchandise
quests.description: I’ve become quite crafty at weaving bandages from Fabric, but to my shame, I haven’t quite mastered weaving an x-ray machine or a pulse oximiter.
objectives: On Spaceport, search 2 containers in the Departure Building's exam rooms
Search 3 containers in the Hospital in Buried City
On Dam Battlegrounds, search 2 containers in the Research & Administration building's medical room

quests.name: Mixed Signals
quests.description:
Have you spotted any Surveyors; the big round ones? 

They seem to be transmitting data back into orbit, and I can’t help but think it's tied to that signal we picked up. Will you break one open, so we can try to decipher the data?
objectives: Destroy an ARC Surveyor
Obtain 1 Surveyor Vault

quests.name: Movie Night
quests.description: Everyone's been on edge ever since rumors of that ARC signal spread. I was thinking a movie night would be a great distraction, but I'm missing some crucial supplies. You'll help me out, yeah?
objectives: Deliver a Portable TV to Apollo
On Stella Montis, search the Cultural Archives for old movie tapes
Deliver the Stack of Movie Tapes to Apollo

quests.name: Off The Radar
quests.description: The damage down here was pretty bad, but our Topside infrastructure was hit even harder. I still have several antennas that stopped working after the storm.
objectives: Visit a Field Depot
Repair the antenna on the roof of the Field Depot

quests.name: On Deaf Ears
quests.description:
Seems like every other Raider here has some serious hearing damage.

I heard rumors they developed some extra advanced hearing aids at Stella Montis. If you can track them down, we might all be able to use our indoor voices, for once.
objectives: Find the researcher's guest logs on the reception computers
Find where the researcher held their lecture, and access their notes
Find information about the prototypes on the Medical Research computers
Find the printed shipping logs in the Assembly Workshops

quests.name: On The Map
quests.description: We know the coordinates for those hearing aids, but I’ll have to cross-reference them with a paper map of the Spaceport. Those legs of yours aren’t too tired, are they?
objectives: Head to where the Fuel Lines snapped, and transmit your location
Head to the antenna near the Fuel Control, and transmit your location
Head to the cactus patch in the wall breach, and transmit your location
Transmit your location from the roof of the Container Storage building
Find the container covered in tarp, and mark it

quests.name: Our Presence up There
quests.description: ARC may be changing, but we’re finally changing with it. Let’s finish up those outposts and revolutionize the way we track them, flank them, and smash them to bits.
objectives: Visit the Pattern House in The Dam
Find and flip the power switch
Complete the antenna installation on the roof

quests.name: Out of the Shadows
quests.description: Did you see the flags? The time for cowering is over. You’ve been more than battle-tested, from what I hear; think you can take on a Rocketeer?
objectives: Destroy a Rocketeer
Obtain a Rocketeer Driver

quests.name: Outstanding Balance
quests.description:
I had a deal for a Bastion Cell lined up with a Raider called Dodger, but he's gone quiet. 

I need someone to track down his stash before some scavenger stumbles into it. Interested?
objectives: Search for Dodger's stash inside the Traffic Tunnel
Search Dodger's deal spot by the Pilgrim's Peak antenna
Deliver Dodger's Note to Tian Wen

quests.name: Paving the Way
quests.description: For an entire sector to collapse like that… No wonder people are scared. We need to reinforce beyond anything we’ve done before, and we can’t do it alone.
objectives: Go to any ENELICA building
Search for a notice board with a note from the researcher
On Buried City, reach the top floor above the Convinio in Piazza Roma
Find the researcher's flat and search for any research data

quests.name: Picking Up The Pieces
quests.description: The storm has mostly settled, but much of our infrastructure has taken a proper beating. If you're hoping to stay with us, I'll need you to pull your weight in the repair efforts.
objectives: Visit any area on your map with a loot category icon
Loot 3 containers

quests.name: Power Out
quests.description: This goes beyond bad luck. Something—or someone—has knocked out some of our electrical substations. The engineer I sent out to fix it hasn’t returned, so I need all available Raiders to look into it. That includes you.
objectives: Find the Electrical Substation south of the Spaceport
Find any sign of the missing engineer
Install the fuse
Restore the power

quests.name: Prescriptions of the Past
quests.description: I’ve been curious about the medical area in the Spaceport for a while now. Something tells me it’s got just what I need to become the undeniable champion of this place.
objectives: Visit the Departure Building in Spaceport
Find the Medical Exam Room inside the Departure Building
Search for the records

quests.name: Reduced to Rubble
quests.description: That collapsed highway worries me; it looks to be recent. Much of Topside may be in ruins, but most of it is from ages ago.
objectives: Take a photo of the Collapsed Highway
Go to the Broken Earth
Follow the trail of destruction through the Broken Earth
Investigate the unknown ARC machines

quests.name: Safe Harbor
quests.description: Seems like news of the train derailment spread fast… And drove many workers to stash some very tasty technology away from prying eyes.
objectives: Find the clue left by the restaurant kitchen staff
Find the area portrayed in the sketch
Dig up the buried part
Deliver the Precision Gimbal to Tian Wen

quests.name: Safe Passage
quests.description:
I heard rumors about some signal Shani picked up. ARC is constantly adapting, and I'm sure this won’t be their last warning sign.

Well, if it’s an arms race they want, they can get one.
objectives: Destroy 2 ARC enemies using any explosive grenade

quests.name: Settled in Full
quests.description: Lucky for you, Dodger's debt can still be settled. Bring me a Bastion Cell. A real one, pulled from a real Bastion. Consider what Dodger owed me transferred to credit for you. Okay?
objectives: Destroy a Bastion
Deliver a Bastion Cell to Tian Wen

quests.name: Shoring Up Defenses
quests.description:
The wide-open coastline used to mean danger, but now it's the only place we can spot new threats moving into the Rust Belt.

So we'll have to make our own cover, and reinforce what few defenses we can find.
objectives: Destroy 5 Wasps
Destroy 3 Fireflies
Use 1 ARC Alloy to reinforce the Raider structure on top of any Stacking Yard crane
Board up shuttered windows in the hotel

quests.name: Snap and Salvage
quests.description: All of Speranza is buzzing about Stella Montis right now, and I admit it’s caught my attention. Let the others sort out the whats and hows; I’m interested in the tech inside.
objectives: Take a Photo of any of the Rovers in the Sandbox
Search the papers in the Security Checkpoint room by the Lobby
Deliver a Magnetron to Tian Wen
Deliver a Flow Controller to Tian Wen

quests.name: Source of the Contamination
quests.description: I’m not saying our water’s been tampered with, but based on your samples, I can’t rule out the possibility either. Would you return to the Dam and see what’s wrong?
objectives: Reach the Water Treatment Building in The Dam
Search for the Flood Spill Intake near the Swamp
Investigate any suspicious objects

quests.name: Sparks Fly
quests.description:
Those Hornet stings can really mess you up, if you’re unlucky. And even if you destroy one, you’re still wasting a ton of ammo.

I’ve been working on a more elegant way to bring them down. Care to make some sparks fly?
objectives: Destroy a Hornet with a Trigger 'Nade or Snap Blast

quests.name: Stable Housing
quests.description: You like a certain amount of uncertainty, right? A client wants the contents of a locked safe in Stella Montis. It's intact, so whatever's inside has been there since before the Exodus. Interested?
objectives: Go to the Security Bridge
Search for the safe in the side room by the third-floor staircases
Head upstairs to the fourth-floor control room
Use the Access Card Printer to print a key to the safe
Search for alternate ways into the safe
Retrieve the contents of the safe
Deliver the Project Heartwood Blueprints to Tian Wen

quests.name: Straight Record
quests.description: Back during the First Wave, my squad and I built a trap out by the Dam. Overloaded a generator, turned it into a makeshift ARC trap. Now I hear Raiders are using it to cut comms and spring ambushes on each other. I need you to end it.
objectives: Reach Victory Ridge
Find the old EMP trap
Disable the first power switch
Disable the second power switch
Disable the third power switch
Shut down the EMP trap

quests.name: Switching the Supply
quests.description: There is a reservoir beneath the Spaceport; if we manage to rout that water here, that should buy us time to deal with the contamination.
objectives: Find the tunnels under the Spaceport
Find and turn the valve in the tunnels under Spaceport

quests.name: Test Case
quests.description: Hey, question for you. What do you get if you cross a Hornet and Fireball? If your answer is ‘a Firefly’, then we’re on the same page.
objectives: Deliver a Hornet Driver to Apollo
Deliver a Fireball Burner to Apollo
Destroy a Firefly
Deliver a Firefly Burner to Apollo

quests.name: The Clean Dream
quests.description: You know what I've been dreaming of lately? A talking water distiller! Crazy, huh? But seriously, with purer compounds I could make explosives with more oumph! Would be something, right?
objectives: On Spaceport, search 4 containers in the underground tunnels
Find and monitor any Filtration System in the tunnels
On The Blue Gate, visit the Maintenance Bunker
Monitor the Purification System in the bunker
Find and photograph the blueprints in the bunker

quests.name: The League
quests.description:
Kids around here have been kicking empty grenade casings around. It’s only a matter of time before they’re not so empty.

So here’s the plan. You help me with some prep work, and I’ll set up an actual football team for the young ones.
objectives: Deliver a Deflated Football to Apollo
Deliver a Bicycle Pump to Apollo
On Dam Battlegrounds, photograph the goal by the Water Towers
On Buried City, photograph the football magazines in any kiosk

quests.name: The Major’s Footlocker
quests.description:
I have another job. It’s.. about my mom.

Those First Wave sites I sent you to before? I actually hoped you’d find something of my mother’s. She fought in the Raider resistance. It was a long shot; but now I've got an actual lead.
objectives: Search for Major Aiva's mementos in the apartments northwest of The Dam
Deliver Major Aiva's Mementos to Tian Wen

quests.name: The Right Tool
quests.description: You're one of the new arrivals, right? I need a volunteer to test out this upgraded Ferro; should cut through ARC plating like butter. Go put holes in some machines, and report back to me.
objectives: Destroy a Fireball
Destroy a Hornet
Destroy a Turret

quests.name: The Root of the Matter
quests.description: We're in luck. The notes you found last time were written by the lead researcher. When the project went under, it seems she took some of the seed samples and sealed them away in a secure location.
objectives: Go to the Research Building
Search for the seed vault in the "room with a great view"
Deliver the Experimental Seed Sample to Celeste

quests.name: The Stench of Corruption
quests.description: That key you found in the barrel truck… I won’t jump to accusations just yet, but this certainly reeks of an inside job. Could you investigate a hunch I have?
objectives: Reach the southwest lobby of the Departure Building
Find the staff locker room
Search the room for any clues of the saboteur's identity
Reach the tunnels below the Spaceport
Use the key on any Flushing Terminal to override the bypass protocol

quests.name: The Trifecta
quests.description: Intel’s all well and good, but it only gets us so far. If ARC’s truly closing in, I need every Raider to prove they can handle their drones in a fight.
objectives: Destroy a Wasp
Get a Wasp Driver for Shani
Destroy a Hornet
Get a Hornet Driver for Shani
Destroy a Snitch
Get a Snitch Scanner for Shani

quests.name: Trash Into Treasure
quests.description:
There's no such thing as junk, to a Raider; just valuable materials waiting to be recycled.

If you're going to amount to anything around here, you can't just wait for things to be served on a silver platter.
objectives: Obtain 6 Wires
Obtain 1 Battery

quests.name: Tribute to Toledo
quests.description: The Official Toledo Tubes Management is demanding one of our Power Rods for usage of “their” Slingshot tubes. Don’t let the name fool you, they’re in no way official; just thugs with lots of power. Could you help me with this?
objectives: Get a Power Rod for Celeste

quests.name: Turnabout
quests.description: I got a plan. If we recover the evidence against the OTTM before they get to it, we might get them off our backs once and for all.
objectives: Go to the North Trench Tower
Locate and upload the blackmail files to Celeste

quests.name: Unexpected Initiative
quests.description: I’m setting up a greenhouse, to help boost our food production. I’m doing Celeste a solid, alright? That’s all. But enough about that. I’ve got all the details worked out, but I’ll need supplies, and I’m not hauling them alone.
objectives: Reach the Grandioso Apartments in Buried City
Search for a Moisture Meter on the rooftop of the Grandioso Apartments
Reach Piazza Roma in Buried City
Search for a Nutrient Meter in the broken rooftop gardens at Piazza Roma
Deliver a Nutrient Meter to Tian Wen
Deliver a Moisture Meter to Tian Wen

quests.name: Untended Garden
quests.description: According to the files you found in the lab, the cultivation researchers were actually the ones who set up the hydroponic domes out in the swamp. Sounds like the most obvious place to search next, don’t you think?
objectives: Go to the Hydroponic Dome Complex
Access the data archive in one of the domes
Upload the data to the computer terminal in any Field Depot

quests.name: Waking the Grid
quests.description: There's a problem with our sensor coverage at the Spaceport. The security grid is old, so maybe it's just acting up. If you could get it running again, it'd save me a lot of sleepless nights.
objectives: Activate the security sensors in one of the Guard Towers
Start the Security Control Center in the Departure Building
Search for any traces of a security breach in the Arrival Building Data Office

quests.name: Water Troubles
quests.description: If you’re here to complain about the water, join the club. I’ve been fielding complaints all day. Something is definitely up with it, and I need some help to sort it out.
objectives: Locate the Flood Access Tunnel under the Red Lake Balcony
Find the intake to the District's Water Supply
Sample the water

quests.name: What Goes Around
quests.description:
We can't build ARC tech from scratch, but there's plenty I can tinker from the pieces you salvage.

I'm currently trying to repurpose different ARC parts. Would you mind running some experiments for me?
objectives: Destroy any ARC enemy using a Fireball Burner

quests.name: What We Left Behind
quests.description: Celeste told me you’re the one who helped her hound me about pitching in more. I’ll say this once: I don’t appreciate the meddling, and I have my own reasons for refusing. I do, however, appreciate the scrap. Since you’re apparently good at tracking it down, I may have a task for you.
objectives: On Buried City, search 2 containers in the Raider Camp beneath the Parking Garage
On Dam Battlegrounds, search for anything significant in the South Swamp Outpost
On Spaceport, search for anything significant in Bilguun's Hideout, next to the Container Storage

quests.name: With A Trace
quests.description: That downed machine… We weren’t the ones who did that. We know that there are stray survivors out there, but this? This goes far beyond a single person.
objectives: Reach the Barren Clearing
Find signs of who brought down the ARC machines
Inspect the Adorned Wreckage
Inspect the communications device

quests.name: With a View
quests.description:
Have you ever noticed those streaks of light darting across the skies? 

I’ve seen too much to believe they’re natural, but it’ll take more than a hunch to convince Celeste.
objectives: Obtain a Rotary Encoder
Visit any of the Control Rooms near the Assembly Line
Use the Rotary Encoder to activate the server switch
Interact with a nearby computer to help identify the correct parts
Deliver an Ion Sputter to Shani

quests.name: Worth Your Salt
quests.description: I found notes that some electrical engineers at the Spaceport were working on advanced, salt-based batteries. If we can get our hands on one, perhaps it’ll prevent full-scale power outages next time a ceiling comes crashing down.
objectives: Go to the Rocket Assembly
Search for the hidden Battery Prototype in a high place
Bring the Battery Prototype to the Industrial Recharger
Use the machinery to charge the battery
Deliver the Charged Battery to the drop-off point in the corner
